# Liquid Prnc Glass RELEASE_VERSION

```text
╭────────────────────────────────────────────╮
│  L I Q U I D   P R N C   G L A S S        │
│  source texture -> optical field -> glsl  │
╰────────────────────────────────────────────╯
```

> Standalone WebGL/GLSL optics lab for reusable liquid-glass edge refraction.

Project site: https://liquid-prince.online/
Repository: https://github.com/i4w7w4a/Liquid_Prnc_Glass

## Checks

- `npm run test`
- `npm run build`
- GitHub Actions CI

## Notes

- This is not CSS glassmorphism.
- This is not a blur overlay.
- The optical effect is produced by the WebGL/GLSL renderer pipeline.
